content:
💡 colota | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Users who want to track their location privately and send it to their own server, rather than relying on third-party services.
✨ Key Features: • Self-Hosted • Privacy First • Works Offline • Offline Maps • Scheduled Export
📖 Summary: Colota is a self-hosted GPS location tracking application for Android devices. It allows users to send their location data to a private server, offering features like offline functionality, geofencing, and encrypted backups, all while prioritizing user privacy with no analytics or telemetry.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
